sanskrit:
यत्करोषि यदश्नासि यज्जुहोषि ददासि यत्।
यत्तपस्यसि कौन्तेय तत्कुरुष्व मदर्पणम्॥
transliteration:
yat karoṣi yad aśnāsi yaj juhoṣi dadāsi yat |
yat tapasyasi kaunteya tat kuruṣva mad-arpaṇam ||
literal_meaning: Whatever you do, whatever you eat, whatever you offer, whatever you give away, whatever austerities you perform, O son of Kuntī, make that an offering to Me.
contextual_meaning: Convert every ordinary act into a mindful, values-aligned ritual; the psyche is soothed when all sub-selves serve one transcendent intention.
psychological_state: Unified flow-state where disparate roles (worker, parent, consumer) cohere under a single narrative, reducing decision-fatigue and existential diffusion.
trigger_scenario: Overwhelmed remote worker juggling Slack pings, toddler screams, and DoorDash; remembers verse, takes one conscious breath, and dedicates the next email to something bigger than inbox-zero.
anchor_text: Turn every daily act into a gift offered to something greater than yourself.
